sentences.english: Hello, my name is Anita and I'm from Taiwan.
sentences.korean: 안녕하세요, 제 이름은 아니타이고 대만에서 왔어요.

sentences.english: Taiwan is a very small country and I'm not sure where Taiwan can be considered a country or not.
sentences.korean: 대만은 아주 작은 나라라 어디서 유명한지 잘 모르겠어요.

sentences.english: I like Taiwan very well because we have nice food, nice weather — the winter is warm — and people are friendly.
sentences.korean: 대만을 아주 좋아해요.

sentences.english: I like to stay in Taiwan very much.
sentences.korean: 맛있는 음식, 좋은 날씨 — 겨울이 따뜻하고 — 사람들이 친절하거든요.

sentences.english: My name is Jeyong Kim.
sentences.korean: 제 이름은 김제영이고 한국에서 왔어요.

quiz.question: What does '파운드(무게 단위, 약 0.45kg)' mean in English?

sentences.english: I am from Korea and I'm 19 years old.
sentences.korean: 19살이에요.

sentences.english: Koreans like kimchi, yes, and most of the Koreans like spicy food, but I for example cannot eat spicy food very well because my tongue gets really hot.
sentences.korean: 한국인들은 김치를 좋아하고, 대부분 매운 음식을 좋아해요.

sentences.english: Hi, my name is Martin.
sentences.korean: 안녕, 제 이름은 마틴이고 미국 워싱턴주 시애틀에서 왔어요.

sentences.english: I'm from Seattle, Washington in the United States.
sentences.korean: 시애틀은 미국 북서쪽 모서리에 있어요.

sentences.english: Seattle, if you haven't heard of it, is in the northwest corner of the U.S.
sentences.korean: 시애틀은

sentences.english: It's very famous for salmon and the Space Needle.
sentences.korean: 혹시 모르시면 미국 북서쪽 모서리에 있어요

sentences.english: I went to school there, at the University of Washington.
sentences.korean: 거기서 워싱턴 대학교를 다녔어요.

sentences.english: It's a very beautiful campus.
sentences.korean: 아주 아름다운 캠퍼스이고 매우 커요 — 학생이 3만 명이에요.

sentences.english: Very large campus — there's 30,000 people there, on the campus.
sentences.korean: 아주 아름다운 캠퍼스예요

sentences.english: People from all over the world.
sentences.korean: 매우 큰 캠퍼스 3만 명의 학생이 있어요

quiz.question: What does '운동을 하다' mean in English?

sentences.english: Hello, my name is Naomi.
sentences.korean: 안녕, 제 이름은 나오미이고 호주에서 왔어요.

sentences.english: I'm from Australia. In Australia I live on the Sunshine Coast, which, as you can tell from the name, is a very sunny place.
sentences.korean: 호주에서 선샤인 코스트에 사는데, 이름에서 알 수 있듯이 호주에서 아주 화창한 지역이에요.

sentences.english: We have very beautiful beaches.
sentences.korean: 이름에서 알 수 있듯이 호주에서 매우 화창한 지역이에요

sentences.english: I will go to the beach with my dog and my family and we have a very outdoor lifestyle there.
sentences.korean: 강아지와 가족과 해변에 가고, 거기서 아주 야외 활동적인 생활을 해요.

sentences.english: Hello, my name is Marion and I'm from Ireland.
sentences.korean: 안녕, 제 이름은 매리언이고 아일랜드에서 왔어요.

quiz.question: What does '운동을 하다' mean in English?

sentences.english: One thing I love about Ireland is the green that's everywhere.
sentences.korean: 아일랜드에서 좋아하는 한 가지는 어디에나 있는 초록빛이에요.

sentences.english: We have lots of space in Ireland and lots of nature — lots of green fields and mountains — and it's great to be able to go and walk along the hills and the mountains when you feel like taking some exercise.
sentences.korean: 아일랜드에는 넓은 공간과 자연이 많아요 — 초록 들판과 산이 많고 — 그걸 즐길 수 있어서 정말 좋아요.

sentences.english: My name is Akane and I'm from Toronto, Canada.
sentences.korean: 제 이름은 아카네이고 캐나다 토론토에서 왔어요.

sentences.english: One thing that I like about my country is that in Canada there are lots of different kinds of apples and I really like apples.
sentences.korean: 우리나라에서 좋아하는 한 가지는 캐나다에 맛있는 사과가 정말 많다는 거예요.

sentences.english: Usually you can get them for about 99 cents a pound and there are many varieties such as Granny Smith and Macintosh, which were invented in Ontario, and Red Delicious, Golden Delicious.
sentences.korean: 보통 파운드당 99센트 정도에 살 수 있고, 그래니 스미스나 매킨토시 같은 다양한 품종이 있는데 제가 가장 좋아하는 두 가지예요.

sentences.english: My favorite is Royal Gala.
sentences.korean: 제가 가장 좋아하는 건 로열 갈라예요.
